Public Sector Undertakings

Supporting national enterprises with robust IT infrastructure and secure digital transformation services.

Your Trusted Partner for Digital India

CYROTICS Technologies has extensive experience working with Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs) and government bodies to build the digital backbone of the nation. We understand the unique challenges of the public sector, including the need for stringent security, regulatory compliance, and long-term reliability.

Our solutions are designed to align with the Digital India mission, enabling government agencies to deliver services more efficiently, secure citizen data, and modernize their operations for the future.

Our Solutions for the Public Sector

Modern IT Infrastructure

Designing and deploying robust data centers, high-speed networks, and scalable IT infrastructure to support critical government operations and citizen services.

Cybersecurity Solutions

Implementing multi-layered security frameworks, including next-gen firewalls, zero-trust architecture, and 24/7 monitoring to protect sensitive government data.

Data Center Modernization & Cloud Migration

Assisting PSUs in modernizing their legacy data centers and migrating workloads to secure government community clouds (GCC) or hybrid cloud environments.

Integrated Surveillance and Security

Deploying campus-wide surveillance, access control, and fire safety systems with integrated command centers for enhanced physical security of government facilities.

Ready to Modernize Your Infrastructure?

Contact us to learn how we can help your organization meet its technology goals while adhering to public sector standards.
